query:
SELECT externalId, serviceType, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, discoveryNotes
FROM services
WHERE externalId IN ('SSHKYHNC','IPTEL-AB0','IPTELAB0')
   OR externalId LIKE 'SSHKYHN%'
   OR externalId LIKE 'IPTEL%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

   OR externalId LIKE 'IPTEL%'
LIMIT 10;
